where.if: AND (1=0 OR oi.order_id::TEXT ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR oi.prod_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND oi.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND oi.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND oi.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND oi.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderItem :: selectById */ oi.* , prod_nm AS prod_nm_current, thumbnail_url, sale_price , sk.sku_code , oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1 , oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2 , cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderItem :: selectList */ oi.* , thumbnail_url, sale_price , sk.sku_code , oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1 , oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2 , cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm , cd_dc.code_label AS dliv_courier_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dc ON cd_dc.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_dc.code_value = oi.dliv_courier_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderItem :: selectPageList */ oi.* , thumbnail_url, sale_price , sk.sku_code , oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1 , oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2 , cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm , cd_dc.code_label AS dliv_courier_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dc ON cd_dc.code_grp = 'COURIER' AND cd_dc.code_value = oi.dliv_courier_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(oi.*) FROM od_order_item oi /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderItem :: selectPageCount */

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdOrderItem :: selectByOrderId */ oi.* , thumbnail_url , sk.sku_code , oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1 , oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2 , cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.reg_date ASC
